questionHtml: Suggest advantages of the cerebral cortex containing a high percentage of the brain’s neurons.
markschemeHtml:
a. more neurons means more synapses/connections

b. higher cognitive ability

c. capacity for information processing increased

OWTTE

[Max 2 Marks]
